revision.comment: lazy [sic] (with link)
revision.text: <nowiki>[</nowiki> [[Sic (Latin)|sic]] <nowiki>]</nowiki>

revision.comment: not sure about the whitespace
revision.text: <nowiki>[</nowiki>[[Sic (Latin)|sic]]<nowiki>]</nowiki>

revision.comment: italicize sic as per various style guides e.g. http://www.docstyles.com/archive/cmscrib.pdf
revision.text: <nowiki>[</nowiki>''[[Sic (Latin)|sic]]''<nowiki>]</nowiki>

revision.comment: ... which simplifies the wikitext...
revision.text: [''[[Sic (Latin)|sic]]'']

revision.comment: It really shouldn't be a Wiki link. Doing so is just distracting.
rv: maybe so, but this template is a replacement for those [[sic (latin)|sic]]s that *are* linked
revision.text: [''[[Sic (Latin)|sic]]'']

revision.comment: [[sic (latin)]] moved to [[sic]] as of february '06
Protected Template:Sic: on today's featured article [edit=sysop:move=sysop] (expires 00:00, 31 January 2007 (UTC))
formatting for consistency with other inline templates
revision.text: <sup class="noprint">[''[[sic]]'']</sup>

revision.comment: Protected Template:Sic: on tomorrow's featured article [edit=sysop:move=sysop] (expires 00:00, 28 March 2007 (UTC))
revision.text: <sup class="noprint">[''[[sic]]'']</sup>

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Blanked the page
[[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 139274358 by [[Special:Contributions/66.162.5.30|66.162.5.30]] ([[User talk:66.162.5.30|talk]])
revision.text: <sup class="noprint">[''[[sic]]'']</sup>

revision.comment: Category:Quotation templates
revision.text: <sup class="noprint">[''[[sic]]'']</sup><noinclude>[[Category:Quotation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: No reason for that to noprint.
revision.text: <sup>[''[[sic]]'']</sup><noinclude>[[Category:Quotation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: template doc template
revision.text:
<sup>[''[[sic]]'']</sup><noinclude>
{{template doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: new features
forgot that was hex
see if this works
add {{NAMESPACE}} to force false #ifeq outside article space
fix
oops
remove blank [sic] which made it impossible to format usage properly with trailing punctuation
Protected Template:Sic: High-risk template [edit=sysop:move=sysop]

revision.text:
<!--
Display the first two default parameters
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?||{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}} }}<!--
Display options for [sic] linked, unlinked(default) or hidden.
-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}|<sup>[''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}| sic|[[sic]]}}'']</sup>|}}<!--
Categorisation options
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]]}}}}<noinclude> {{template doc}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Correct hide logic
revision.text:
<!--
Display the first two default parameters
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?||{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}} }}<!--
Display options for [sic] linked, unlinked(default) or hidden.
-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}||<sup>[''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}| sic|[[sic]]}}'']</sup>}}<!--
Categorisation options
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]]}}}}<noinclude> {{template doc}} </noinclude>

<!--
Display the first two default parameters
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?||{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}} }}<!--

-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}||<sup>[''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}| sic|[[sic]]}}{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?}}'']</sup>}}<!--

-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]]}}}}<noinclude> {{template doc}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: removing superscript, per [[Wikipedia talk:Manual of Style#sic: superscript?]]
revision.text:
<!--
Display the first two default parameters unless ?
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?|{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}} |{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}} }}<!--
Display options for [sic] linked, unlinked(default) or hidden.
-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}||[''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}|sic|[[sic]]}}{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?}}'']}}<!--
Categorisation options
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]]}}}}<noinclude> {{template doc}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: don't produce extra space if sic is hidden per talk page request
revision.text:
<!--
Display the first two default parameters unless ?
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?|{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}|{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}}}<!--
Display options for [sic] linked, unlinked(default) or hidden.
-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}|| [''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}|sic|[[sic]]}}{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?}}'']}}<!--
Categorisation options
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]]}}}}<noinclude> {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: remove {{pp-template}} since included in {{documentation}}

revision.comment: temporarily disable category output pending resolution of https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help_talk:CS1_errors#.7B.7Bsic.7C.3F.7Cnolink.3Dy.7D.7D - per protected edit request
revision.text:
<!--
Display the first two default parameters unless ?
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?|{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}|{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}}}<!--
Display options for [sic] linked, unlinked(default) or hidden.
-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}|| [''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}|sic|[[sic]]}}{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?}}'']}}<!--
Categorisation options. Currently disabled - see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help_talk:CS1_errors#.7B.7Bsic.7C.3F.7Cnolink.3Dy.7D.7D
--><!--{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]]}}}}--><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Sic: Protecting admin inactive, allowing template editors ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<!--
Display the first two default parameters unless ?
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?|{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}|{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}}}<!--
Display options for [sic] linked, unlinked(default) or hidden.
-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}|| [''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}|sic|[[sic]]}}{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?}}'']}}<!--
Categorisation options. Currently disabled - see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help_talk:CS1_errors#.7B.7Bsic.7C.3F.7Cnolink.3Dy.7D.7D
--><!--{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]]}}}}--><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: per [[Template talk:Sic#Template-protected edit request on 14 August 2018]]
revision.text:
<!--
Display the first two default parameters unless ?
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?|{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}|{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}}}<!--
Display options for [sic] linked, unlinked(default) or hidden.
-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}|| [''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}|sic|[[sic]]}}{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?}}'']}}<!--
Categorisation options. Currently disabled - see [[Help talk:CS1 errors/Archive 1#%7B%7Bsic%7C?%7Cnolink=y%7D%7D]]
--><!--{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]]}}}}--><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: First round to make this more CS1/CS2-compatible: Don't use HTML entities to avoid COinS metadata pollution in CS1/CS2. Replaced space by nbsp to tag "sic" onto preceding problematic text (this would normally cause problems, because its a HTML entity, but nbsp gets treated specially and converted into space by CS1/CS2, so it's safe here). (CS1/CS2 still shows error message due to italics markup, see [[Help_talk:Citation_Style_1#Journal_template_&_sic]] for details and possible solution.)
revision.text:
<!-- To avoid COinS metadata pollution in CS1/CS2 do not add any HTML entities other than   (which get's treated specially inside CS1/CS2). CS1/CS2 strips off italic ('') and bold markup ('''), but still throws an error message - see [[Help_talk:Citation_Style_1#Journal_template_&_sic]]. --><!--
Display the first two default parameters unless ?
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?|{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}|{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}}}<!--
Display options for [sic] linked, unlinked(default) or hidden.
-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}|| [''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}|sic|<nowiki/>[[sic]]}}{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?}}'']}}<!--
Categorisation options. Currently disabled - see [[Help talk:CS1 errors/Archive 1#%7B%7Bsic%7C?%7Cnolink=y%7D%7D]]
--><!--{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]]}}}}--><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Undid revision 1048564132 by [[Special:Contributions/Matthiaspaul|Matthiaspaul]] ([[User talk:Matthiaspaul|talk]]) no consensus that _anything_ needs to change in related discussion

--><!--{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||}}}}--><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<!--
Display the first two default parameters unless ?
-->{{#ifeq:{{{1|?}}}|?|{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}|{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}}}<!--
Display options for [sic] linked, unlinked(default) or hidden.
-->{{#if:{{{hide|}}}|| [''{{#if:{{{nolink|}}}|sic|[[sic]]}}{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|?}}'']}}<!--
Categorisation options. Currently disabled - see [[Help talk:CS1 errors/Archive 1#%7B%7Bsic%7C?%7Cnolink=y%7D%7D]]
--><!--{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|?|{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||}}}}--><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Articles containing possible transcription errors]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
